caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses performs on a stage against a backdrop of light-brown horizontal blinds. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest adorned with blue embroidery and a red and white patterned garment around his waist. He stands before a microphone on a stand, singing with his mouth open. A guitar is partially visible, held by the man. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, indicating an audience. The text "ORCA" appears on a small white rectangular label on the right side of the scene. Across the frames, the man remains in a similar singing pose, with slight changes in his facial expression and the positioning of his mouth as he performs. The overall setting and the positions of the people and equipment remain constant throughout the sequence.
